query:
SELECT 
  date_label,
  slot,
  section,
  status,
  title,
  linkedin_url,
  created_at,
  published_at
FROM linkedin_posts
WHERE date_label >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY date_label DESC, 
  FIELD(slot, 'morning', 'startup-afternoon', 'afternoon', 'evening')
LIMIT 20;
